# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.2.x   | Yes |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security issues privately by emailing hi@codepawl.dev.

Include as much detail as possible, including:

- A short summary of the issue
- Affected version(s)
- Steps to reproduce
- Any proof-of-concept or logs

We aim to acknowledge reports promptly and coordinate disclosure on a
case-by-case basis. Please allow up to 90 days for coordinated disclosure
before public publication unless we agree otherwise.

You can also create a private security advisory on GitHub:

https://github.com/codepawl/featcat/security/advisories/new
